subject: OpenAI 携手 Trail of Bits

source_quote: OpenAI launches new initiative to help find and patch open-source bugs

subject: OpenAI 携手 Trail of Bits
object: "Patch the Planet"开源漏洞修复计划
source_quote: OpenAI announced a new initiative on Monday designed to help the open source community improve its cybersecurity game and ward off bugs.

subject: OpenAI 携手 Trail of Bits
object: "Patch the Planet"开源漏洞修复计划
source_quote: “Patch the Planet,” (which is a not-so-subtle allusion to “ Hack the Planet ,” the iconic catch phrase from the 1995 movie Hackers ) will see OpenAI team up with the security company Trail of Bits to help open source maintainers secure their projects.

subject: OpenAI 携手 Trail of Bits
object: "Patch the Planet"开源漏洞修复计划
source_quote: OpenAI said security staff from Trail of Bits will work directly with open source maintainers to review potential code issues. OpenAI’s security tools — like Codex Security — will be used to assist in the process.

subject: Anthropic 频繁警告 AI 风险或触发出口
object: Five in every 1,000 words used by Anthropic in 2026 related to risk, regulation, or restrictions, according to FT research that analyzed official statements, social media posts, and articles written by the company or its chief, Dario Amodei. The equivalent figure for OpenAI and Sam Altman was eight times lower, at 0.6 words per 1,000.
source_quote: Five in every 1,000 words used by Anthropic in 2026 related to risk, regulation, or restrictions, according to FT research that analyzed official statements, social media posts, and articles written by the company or its chief, Dario Amodei. The equivalent figure for OpenAI and Sam Altman was eight times lower, at 0.6 words per 1,000.

subject: Anthropic 频繁警告 AI 风险或触发出口
object: The FT analysis also found that Anthropic had softened its language significantly since 2023, as its AI tools had gained popularity. Its use of risk and regulation-related language has roughly halved from the same period in 2023.
source_quote: The FT analysis also found that Anthropic had softened its language significantly since 2023, as its AI tools had gained popularity. Its use of risk and regulation-related language has roughly halved from the same period in 2023.

subject: Anthropic 频繁警告 AI 风险或触发出口
object: French President Emmanuel Macron this week said the Anthropic dispute had “clarified the stakes” for the US and its allies in the G7. He called for “stronger regulation of artificial intelligence” and warned against the risk of “non-cooperation among democracies.”
source_quote: French President Emmanuel Macron this week said the Anthropic dispute had “clarified the stakes” for the US and its allies in the G7. He called for “stronger regulation of artificial intelligence” and warned against the risk of “non-cooperation among democracies.”

subject: Sakana AI
object: Today, Sakana AI launched Sakana Fugu . It is a multi-agent orchestration system that behaves like one model. You send a request to a single endpoint. Fugu decides how to handle it internally. It solves a task directly when that is enough. It also assembles and coordinates a team of expert models when needed. The complexity of a multi-agent system never reaches your code.
source_quote: Today, Sakana AI launched Sakana Fugu . It is a multi-agent orchestration system that behaves like one model. You send a request to a single endpoint. Fugu decides how to handle it internally. It solves a task directly when that is enough. It also assembles and coordinates a team of expert models when needed. The complexity of a multi-agent system never reaches your code.

subject: Sakana AI
object: Fugu delivers a multi-agent system behind one OpenAI-compatible API.
source_quote: Fugu delivers a multi-agent system behind one OpenAI-compatible API.

subject: Sakana AI
object: Fugu Ultra leads most published coding and reasoning benchmarks.
source_quote: Fugu Ultra leads most published coding and reasoning benchmarks.

subject: Sakana AI
object: Sakana AI frames this as a hedge against single-vendor dependency. If one provider restricts access, Fugu routes around the disruption. The research team cites recent export controls on Anthropic’s Fable and Mythos models as motivation. Over time, newer models can be folded into the pool.
source_quote: Sakana AI frames this as a hedge against single-vendor dependency. If one provider restricts access, Fugu routes around the disruption. The research team cites recent export controls on Anthropic’s Fable and Mythos models as motivation. Over time, newer models can be folded into the pool.

subject: Sakana AI
object: 性能
source_quote: Tokyo-based startup Sakana AI has unveiled Fugu, a multi-LLM orchestrator that looks and feels like a single model to the user. Sakana already had strong results with orchestrator setups for coding. Its ALE-Agent placed 21st out of 1,000 human experts in a coding competition.

subject: Sakana AI
object: 性能
source_quote: Sakana AI's Fugu orchestrates multiple LLMs to match Anthropic's Fable and Mythos benchmarks

subject: Sakana AI
object: 性能
source_quote: Japanese AI startup Sakana AI is launching Fugu, a system that dynamically coordinates multiple language models from a swappable pool while behaving like a single model through one API.

subject: Sakana AI
object: 性能
source_quote: Sakana says Fugu outperforms Anthropic's best models, Fable and Mythos, in benchmarks, even though neither model is part of its LLM pool.

subject: ContraVault AI

source_quote: ContraVault AI Raises $3.1M Pre-Series A to Revolutionize Procurement Intelligence

subject: ContraVault AI
object: $3.1M Pre-Series A to Revolutionize Procurement Intelligence
source_quote: The Bengaluru-based startup just closed a $3.1 million pre-Series A funding round. But the money is almost secondary to what it represents. This is the market finally waking up to a problem that has been hiding in plain sight for decades.

subject: ContraVault AI
object: $3.1M Pre-Series A to Revolutionize Procurement Intelligence
source_quote: ContraVault AI Raises $3.1M Pre-Series A Led by Chiratae Ventures

subject: ContraVault AI
object: $3.1M Pre-Series A to Revolutionize Procurement Intelligence
source_quote: This is not the first money ContraVault AI has raised. Before this round, the company had pulled in roughly $600,000 from Titan Capital and angel investors at the seed stage. So the total funding now sits at approximately $3.7 million. Not bad for a company that did not exist two years ago.

subject: 贝恩用 vibecoding 生成 AI 复制品评估软件
object: 目标
source_quote: Consulting firm Bain & Company is using vibecoding to build AI-generated replicas of acquisition targets' software, helping potential buyers assess how easily a company's technology could be reproduced as the cost of building software drops fast.

subject: 贝恩用 vibecoding 生成 AI 复制品评估软件
object: 目标
source_quote: To assess the competitive edge of acquisition targets, consulting firm Bain & Company is vibecoding replicas of their software. The AI-generated mock-ups are already shaping concrete buying decisions.

subject: 贝恩用 vibecoding 生成 AI 复制品评估软件
object: 目标
source_quote: What began in 2023 with a dedicated engineering team has scaled to hundreds of rough prototypes now built by regular consultants to evaluate whether a software company's code is truly its competitive moat.

subject: 贝恩用 vibecoding 生成 AI 复制品评估软件
object: 目标
source_quote: The approach is already shaping real deal outcomes: one private equity investor said a Bain-vibecoded recreation of an analytics platform directly contributed to their decision to walk away from a bid.

subject: undisclosed_subject
object: 联想百应 AI 主机 300 体验：AI Max+395 芯片加持，能跑 120B 本地大模型
source_quote: 最近，NVIDIA 在 GTC Taipei 期间发布了 RTX Spark 超级芯片，引起业界的广泛关注，被认为标志着个人计算产业迎来了自图形加速时代以来最重大的变革。

subject: undisclosed_subject
object: 联想百应 AI 主机 300 体验：AI Max+395 芯片加持，能跑 120B 本地大模型
source_quote: 而搭载 AMD 锐龙 AI Max+ 395 处理器的设备早在去年 1 月的 CES 大会上就已经发布，如今早已成为众多 AI 迷你工作站主机甚至是高端 AI 笔记本的“标配”选择。

subject: undisclosed_subject
object: 联想百应 AI 主机 300 体验：AI Max+395 芯片加持，能跑 120B 本地大模型
source_quote: 不过，在具体了解这款 RTX Spark 超级芯片之后，小编想到，这款芯片的思路，其实和 AMD 的“Strix Halo”锐龙 AI Max 300 系列处理器有着异曲同工之妙。

subject: undisclosed_subject
object: 联想百应 AI 主机 300 体验：AI Max+395 芯片加持，能跑 120B 本地大模型
source_quote: 这两年，AI 已经成为不止科技圈，而是各行各业都重点关注的焦点，加上今年以来的“龙虾热”，AI 相关的产品与技术正迅速渗透到人们工作、生活的方方面面。

subject: OpenAI
object: "修补地球"计划，用 AI 助力开源社区提升网络安全
source_quote: IT之家 6 月 23 日消息，OpenAI 于当地时间周一宣布推出一项全新计划，旨在助力开源社区提升网络安全防护能力、防范代码漏洞。

subject: OpenAI
object: "修补地球"计划，用 AI 助力开源社区提升网络安全
source_quote: 开源程序中的漏洞，极易给各类商用代码库带来重大安全事故，几年前轰动业界的 Log4j 漏洞事件就是典型案例 —— 一款广泛普及的开源工具被曝出高危漏洞，引发全球大范围安全危机。

subject: OpenAI
object: "修补地球"计划，用 AI 助力开源社区提升网络安全
source_quote: 这项名为“修补地球”（Patch the Planet）的计划，名称明显化用了 1995 年经典影片《黑客》中的标志性台词“入侵地球”（Hack the Planet）。

subject: OpenAI
object: "修补地球"计划，用 AI 助力开源社区提升网络安全
source_quote: OpenAI 将与网络安全公司 Trail of Bits 展开合作，协助开源项目维护者加固项目安全。

subject: 百川智能联合清华
object: Baichuan-M4，登顶 OpenAI 医疗评测
source_quote: 此外，Baichuan-M4 推出「全病程记忆」，打通历史病历、多轮问诊、化验趋势与用药反馈， 让模型在多次对话中始终掌握患者是谁、既往有过哪些疾病、各项指标如何变化，而不必每次从零开始 。

subject: 百川智能联合清华

source_quote: 该模型在 HealthBench 及其 Hard、Professional 三个榜单上 同时位列世界第一 ，全面超越 GPT-5.5、Claude Opus 4.7、DeepSeek-V4-Pro，幻觉率低至 3.3%。

subject: 百川智能联合清华
object: Baichuan-M4，登顶 OpenAI 医疗评测
source_quote: 在 OpenAI 提出的医疗评测 HealthBench 上，M4 综合得分 68.6，位列世界第一， 领先第二名 GPT-5.5 超过 10 分 ；在最考验复杂临床决策的 Hard 子集上，M4 领先达 15.9 分。

subject: 阿里巴巴
object: HappyHorse 1.1
source_quote: 阿里巴巴发布视频生成模型 HappyHorse 1.1：更强动态表现力、更高生成一致性、更优视觉质感

subject: 阿里巴巴
object: HappyHorse 1.1
source_quote: IT之家 6 月 22 日消息，今日阿里巴巴发布视频生成模型 HappyHorse 1.1，较 1.0 版本，在动态表现力、主体一致性、指令遵循、视觉质感和音频能力等维度系统性升级。

subject: Google DeepMind 7500 万美元投资 A24，
object: 开发电影 AI 工具
source_quote: A new alliance has formed between a Hollywood studio and a tech juggernaut.

subject: Google DeepMind 7500 万美元投资 A24，
object: 开发电影 AI 工具
source_quote: On Monday, Google DeepMind announced a $75 million investment (per the WSJ) into popular indie film studio A24, known for hits like “Marty Supreme,” “Everything Everywhere All At Once,” and the latest blockbuster “Backrooms.” Google DeepMind is billing the investment as a partnership, a “first-of-its-kind” that will see the two companies create AI tools for filmmaking, with Google DeepMind receiving “feedback and guidance from leading artists.” A24 has recently worked with big names like Timothée Chalamet and Anne Hathaway on several projects.

subject: Google DeepMind 7500 万美元投资 A24，
object: 开发电影 AI 工具
source_quote: “We believe the best way to develop tools that empower artists is to work directly with them,” Demis Hassabis, Google DeepMind co-founder and CEO, said in a press release. “By collaborating with filmmakers and industry leaders like A24 from the beginning, we can build new AI features to support artists in authentic, meaningful storytelling that helps enable their creative vision.”

subject: Google DeepMind 7500 万美元投资 A24，
object: 开发电影 AI 工具
source_quote: Though controversy has swirled around Hollywood over the use of AI in movies, A24 would be far from the first studio to explore integrating AI into the creative process. Netflix announced earlier this year that it was buying Ben Affleck’s company, InterPositive, which creates AI tools for filmmakers. Last year, meanwhile, Amazon’s MGM Studios launched an AI unit focused on developing tools for television and movie production.

subject: 合约最高价值 63 亿美元，SpaceX 与开源 AI 初创企业 Reflection 签署算力
object: 协议
source_quote: IT之家 6 月 22 日消息，据 CNBC 报道，SpaceX 已与开源 AI 初创企业 Reflection AI 签署了一项算力合作协议，最高价值可达 63 亿美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 427.71 亿元人民币）。

subject: 合约最高价值 63 亿美元，SpaceX 与开源 AI 初创企业 Reflection 签署算力
object: 协议
source_quote: IT之家注意到，协议还提到，合约生效满三个月后，任意一方均可提前 90 天通知对方终止合作。

subject: 合约最高价值 63 亿美元，SpaceX 与开源 AI 初创企业 Reflection 签署算力
object: 协议
source_quote: SpaceX 此前已与 Anthropic、谷歌和 Cursor 达成了与算力相关的合作，且 马斯克的公司目前正在收购 Cursor 。

subject: 合约最高价值 63 亿美元，SpaceX 与开源 AI 初创企业 Reflection 签署算力
object: 协议
source_quote: 报道称 Reflection 的加入不仅扩充了 SpaceX 的客户群，更带来了一个具有战略差异性的合作对象：在各国政府和企业纷纷重新评估对封闭 AI 系统依赖度的当下，这是一家专注于开源模型的 AI 企业。

subject: 极摩客 EVO-X3 迷你主机

subject: 优必选
object: Walker C1，可实现人机共舞
source_quote: IT之家 6 月 22 日消息，第四届中国国际供应链促进博览会今日在北京正式开幕，优必选在本次大会上正式发布全新一代面向商用服务场景的 具身智能人形机器人 Walker C1， 覆盖接待导览、商业服务、娱乐互动、教育科研等多场景城市服务。

subject: 优必选
object: Walker C1，可实现人机共舞
source_quote: 官方表示，Walker C1 引入 3D 打印晶格结构作为“肌肉结构”，改变机器人传统的金属、冰冷感； 身高 1.64 米、体重 55 公斤 ，与一名成年女性相仿；全身共计 53 个自由度，其中上肢 14 个、下肢 12 个、腰部与躯干 3 个、颈部 2 个，高精度映射人体运动关键节点，能更真实、更协调地模拟人的动作。

subject: 优必选
object: Walker C1，可实现人机共舞
source_quote: Walker C1 搭载 全身轨迹跟踪、动态平衡算法，以及三个腰部关节 ，能够完成动作实时跟踪控制任务，在面对多耦合、非线性的复杂运动约束时，可精准完成复杂高动态动作的实时-闭环跟踪控制。

subject: 三星
object: 行业最快 UFS 5.0 解决方案：带宽达 10.8GB/s，赋能端侧 AI
source_quote: 三星将于今年第四季度启动 UFS 5.0 量产，推出最高 1TB 的多种容量版本。

subject: 三星
object: 行业最快 UFS 5.0 解决方案：带宽达 10.8GB/s，赋能端侧 AI
source_quote: IT之家 6 月 23 日消息，三星电子今日宣布，其率先研发出了行业最快的通用闪存存储（UFS）5.0 解决方案，该产品将为新一代移动终端流畅、高效地运行各类人工智能服务提供支撑。

subject: 三星
object: 行业最快 UFS 5.0 解决方案：带宽达 10.8GB/s，赋能端侧 AI
source_quote: 三星 UFS 5.0 遵循联合电子设备工程委员会（JEDEC）最新嵌入式存储接口规范，拥有行业顶尖性能，最高带宽可达 10.8GB/s。

subject: 三星
object: 行业最快 UFS 5.0 解决方案：带宽达 10.8GB/s，赋能端侧 AI
source_quote: 这款全新存储方案的连续读取速度最高 10.8GB/s，连续写入速度最高 9.5GB/s，两项速率均达到上一代 UFS 4.1 标准的两倍以上。
